sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65801" key="melainonefh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελαινονεφής</orth> (sic), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n65801.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μελανονεφής</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accompanied by black clouds</tr_>, of sunset and sunrise, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(1).138</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
